title: Improve session and sub-agent status UI in dashboard
description: Improve how sessions and sub-agent status are displayed in the conductor dashboard. Better status propagation, clearer hierarchy, and real-time updates.

dod.criterion: Session cards show real-time status (running, idle, needs-you) with sub-agent tree
Sub-agent status propagates to parent session within 2 seconds

checklist: Open dashboard with 2+ active sessions — cards update in real time
Expand a session with sub-agents — hierarchy renders correctly
Kill a sub-agent — parent session status updates within 2s

reviewers.domain: ux — CEO dashboard experience, status clarity
